chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Mic. Application No.D-17 of 2021. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For orders on M.A. No.11160/2021. For hearing of main case. 31.08.2022. Mr. Shahnawaz Brohi Special Prosecutor ANF. ORDER MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- On 12.06.2021 in supervision of Inspector Naeem Khan ANF team arrested co-accused Arjun from a house in Village Haji Niaz Muhammad Kparti District Mirpurkhas and 98 Kg Charas, 13 Kg Opium and 22 liters of alcohol were recovered. Allegedly, during interrogation he disclosed that house belongs to respondent and on the basis of which respondent was arraigned in the case. He applied for bail before arrest before learned trial Court and has been granted same relief vide impugned order dated 17.08.2021 which the State/ANF has challenged. We have asked Special Prosecutor ANF that except disclosure of co-accused whether any evidence was collected in the shape of statement of witnesses or a document which shows that house actually belongs to respondent, he has replied in negative. Disclosure as above made by co-accused before the police officials is yet to stand test of a trial for determining its evidentiary value. Therefore, we do not find any illegality in impugned order. Accordingly this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed alongwith pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
